home.heroTitle: Boost Your Business with Digital Transformation
home.heroSubtitle: We help companies modernize, automate, and grow efficiently.
home.howWeWorkSubtitle: Our proven process ensures successful project delivery
home.step1Description: Reach out to us through our contact form or schedule a call. We're here to listen to your needs and challenges.
home.step2Description: We schedule a comprehensive meeting to understand your business goals, current situation, and desired outcomes.
home.step3Description: Our team conducts a thorough analysis and develops a customized proposal with timeline, costs, and expected results.
home.step4Description: We execute the project with constant communication, deliver results on time, and provide ongoing support.
home.whyChoose1Text: Our experienced consultants bring deep industry knowledge and technical expertise to every project.
home.whyChoose2Text: We deliver measurable outcomes that drive growth and improve operational efficiency.
home.whyChoose3Text: Your success is our priority. We build lasting partnerships through dedicated support.
home.ctaSubtitle: Let's discuss how we can help you achieve your goals.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions to drive your digital transformation

legacyMigration.name: Legacy System Migration
legacyMigration.description: Modernize your outdated systems with seamless migration to cutting-edge technologies.
legacyMigration.whatWeDoText: We analyze your current infrastructure, develop a comprehensive migration strategy, and execute a smooth transition to modern platforms. Our approach minimizes downtime and ensures data integrity throughout the process.
legacyMigration.whyChooseText: With years of experience in legacy system modernization, we understand the complexities and risks involved. Our proven methodologies ensure a successful migration with minimal business disruption.

webDevelopment.name: Web Development
webDevelopment.description: Build powerful, scalable web applications tailored to your business needs.
webDevelopment.whatWeDoText: From concept to deployment, we create custom web solutions using the latest technologies. Our full-stack development team delivers responsive, user-friendly applications that drive engagement and conversions.
webDevelopment.whyChooseText: We combine technical excellence with business acumen to create web solutions that not only look great but also deliver real business value.

automation.name: Process Automation
automation.description: Streamline operations and boost productivity through intelligent automation solutions.
automation.whatWeDoText: We identify opportunities for automation across your business processes, implement robotic process automation (RPA), and integrate AI-powered solutions to eliminate manual tasks and reduce errors.
automation.whyChooseText: Our automation experts have helped numerous businesses transform their operations. We focus on high-impact automation that delivers quick ROI.

about.title: About ATEP Consulting
about.subtitle: Empowering businesses through innovative technology solutions
about.missionText: We are committed to helping businesses navigate the complexities of digital transformation. Our mission is to deliver innovative, practical solutions that drive growth and create lasting value for our clients.
about.visionText: To be the trusted partner for businesses seeking to modernize their operations and embrace digital innovation. We envision a future where technology empowers every organization to reach its full potential.

gabriela.name: Gabriela Albertini
gabriela.bio: With over 15 years of experience in technology consulting, Gabriela leads ATEP Consulting's strategic vision. Her expertise in digital transformation has helped numerous companies achieve operational excellence.

pablo.name: Pablo Teijeiro
pablo.bio: Pablo brings deep technical expertise and a passion for innovation. As CTO, he oversees all technology implementations and ensures our solutions leverage the latest industry best practices.

blog.title: Insights & Updates
blog.subtitle: Stay informed with the latest trends and best practices in digital transformation

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's discuss how we can help transform your business

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At ATEP Consulting, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.
privacy.collectionText: We collect information that you provide directly to us, such as when you fill out a contact form, subscribe to our newsletter, or communicate with us. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and any other information you choose to provide.
privacy.usageText: We use the information we collect to respond to your inquiries, provide our services, send you marketing communications (with your consent), and improve our website and services.
privacy.protectionText: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also object to or restrict certain processing of your data. To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information provided on our Contact page.

cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookies Policy explains how ATEP Consulting uses cookies and similar technologies on our website.
cookies.whatAreText: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.
cookies.howWeUseText: We use cookies to understand how you interact with our website, remember your preferences, and analyze site traffic. This helps us improve our website and provide you with a better experience.
cookies.essential: Essential Cookies: Required for the website to function properly.
cookies.analytics: Analytics Cookies: Help us understand how visitors use our website.
cookies.preference: Preference Cookies: Remember your settings and preferences.
cookies.controlText: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of our website.

footer.tagline: Empowering businesses through innovative technology solutions
footer.newsletterText: Subscribe to receive insights and updates
